nodes.title: Positive Conditioning
widgets_values: You are an assistant designed to generate superior images with the superior degree of image-text alignment based on textual prompts or user prompts. <Prompt Start> A picture of two characters, a starry night scene with northern lights in background: The first character is Jinx_Arcane, a young woman with long blue hair in a loose braid and bright blue eyes, wearing a cropped halter top, gloves, striped pants with belts, and visible tattoos and the second character is Skeletor in purple hooded cloak flexing muscular blue arms triumphantly, skull face grinning menacingly, cartoon animation style, Masters of the Universe character, vibrant purple and blue color scheme

nodes.title: FreeFuseTokenPositions - Compute Token Positions
widgets_values: You are an assistant designed to generate superior images with the superior degree of image-text alignment based on textual prompts or user prompts. <Prompt Start>

the image contains off two characters.
.. is on the left, .. is on the right.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: lowres, worst quality, CGI, anime, cartoon, digital art, elongated body, distorted anatomy, deformed body, malformed limbs, unrealistic proportions, cartoon anatomy, anime proportions, bad anatomy, extra limbs, missing limbs, facial distortion, bad face, distorted face, pixelated, compression artifact, low quality jpeg. jpeg artifacts. deformed vagina.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: "A photorealistic portrait, detailed skin texture with visible pores and fine lines, natural skin imperfections, subsurface scattering on skin, sharp focus on the face, 85mm lens, f/1.4, cinematic lighting.

use max strenght 0.9 for base model and lora.
Otherwise you get unsharp output.

info.name: FreeFuse Z-Image-Turbo Complete Workflow
info.description: Two-phase FreeFuse workflow for Z-Image-Turbo with multi-LoRA composition. Uses UNETLoader + CLIPLoader(lumina2) + VAE, FreeFuse Phase1/Phase2 nodes, and Lumina2 prompt wrapping for token alignment.
info.author: FreeFuse Team
info.notes: For Z-Image token alignment, conditioning prompt is wrapped as 'SYSTEM_PROMPT <Prompt Start> user_prompt'. Keep Phase1 and Phase2 sampling settings consistent.
